Welcome to Module 5. In this module, we're going to cover the 6-figure Funnel Formula Order Form process. We're going to start by covering the elements of the ideal order form. Then I'm going to introduce you to a killer application from Brian Moran called SamCart which allows marketers who don't have a merchant account to easily and quickly accept credit cards online. It is awesome. It takes care of your upsells, your downsells, your front-end offer, your list segmentation. It is killer. I'm going to introduce you to SamCart. Then I'm going to have Brian Moran walk you through how to actually use SamCart. Again, if you want to get started collecting credit card payments online without any kind of merchant account, all at extremely low rates.
